title: The arrow
premise: A direction sprayed on a wall — and an argument about it.

stages.narration: An arrow the length of your arm, sprayed on the concrete, and a single word under it: SANCTUARY. Beneath that, in a different hand on a different day, someone has added: THERE IS NO SANCTUARY.

choices.label: Fix the direction in memory and decide later

effects.note: marked the sanctuary arrow to decide on later

notes: city-voices. Hope buys morale at the price of a dangerous expectation; doubt is bleak but calming; noting spends a beat and banks a codex hook (disc, T54). No free-lunch option.
